sections.paragraph:
ποτόν, οῦ, τό (Hom.+; PSI 64, 21 [I b.c.]; PGiess 19, 6; LXX; TestSol 11: 7, 9 C; SibOr 3, 746; Philo; Jos., Bell. 3, 183, Ant. 1, 245f; Ar.; subst. neut. of ποτός, ή, όν=drinkable) that which one drinks, drink w. τροφή (food and) drink (Longus 2, 7, 4; Jos., Ant. 7, 159) gener. D 10:3a, then of the Eucharist πνευματικὴ τροφὴ καὶ ποτόν 3b. W. βρωτόν GJs 1:4. Pl. βρώματα καὶ ποτά (βρῶμα 1 and cp. PSI loc. cit. μήτε ἐν ποτοῖς μήτε ἐν βρωτοῖς; EpArist 128 al.) ITr 2:3. Also σιτία καὶ ποτά (cp. Hdt. 5, 34, 1; X., An. 7, 1, 33; oft. Philo) Dg 6:9.—DELG s.v. πίνω C. TW.

Hom Hom , VIII b.c.—List 5

PSI PSI = Papiri greci e latini: Pubblicazioni della Società Italiana—List 4

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

TestSol TestSol = Testament of Solomon, I–III a.d.—List 2

SibOr SibOr = Oracula Sibyllina, II–III a.d.—List 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

Ar. Ar. = Aristides, apologist, II a.d.—List 5

subst. subst. = substantive(ly)

neut. neut. = neuter (used when “n.” would be ambiguous)

Longus Longus , II ?a.d.—List 5

gener. gener. = generally

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

loc. cit loc. cit = loco citato (in the place already cited)

EpArist EpArist = Epistle of Aristeas, II b.c.—List 5

  1. al. =alibi (elsewhere), aliter (otherwise), alii (others)

ITr ITr = Ignatius to the Trallians—List 1

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

  1. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

oft. oft. = often

Dg Dg = Letter of Diognetus, attributed to an unidentifiable apologist; II a.d.—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 857
